dashboard.label: Wellness
dashboard.description: SpO2, body temperature, HRV and sleep timing trends
dashboard.definition:
{"title":"Wellness","description":"SpO2, body temperature, HRV and sleep timing trends","defaults":{"dataSources":{"ds.search":{"options":{"queryParameters":{"latest":"$global_time.latest$","earliest":"$global_time.earliest$"}}}},"visualizations":{"global":{"showProgressBar":true}}},"inputs":{"input_global_trp":{"type":"input.timerange","options":{"token":"global_time","defaultValue":"-14d@d,now"},"title":"Time Range"}},"dataSources":{"ds_spo2_latest":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"index=oura oura_data_type=spo2 | dedup day | spath input=_raw path="spo2_percentage.average" output=spo2_avg | sort -_time | head 1 | eval spo2_avg=round(spo2_avg,1) | table spo2_avg","queryParameters":{"earliest":"-2d","latest":"now"}},"name":"SpO2 — latest"},"ds_temp_latest":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"index=oura oura_data_type=readiness | dedup day | sort -_time | head 1 | eval temp_dev=round(temperature_deviation,2), temp_trend=round(temperature_trend_deviation,2) | table temp_dev, temp_trend","queryParameters":{"earliest":"-2d","latest":"now"}},"name":"Skin temp — latest"},"ds_hrv_latest":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"index=oura oura_data_type=readiness | dedup day | spath input=_raw path="contributors.hrv_balance" output=hrv_bal | sort -_time | head 1 | eval hrv_bal=round(hrv_bal,0) | table hrv_bal","queryParameters":{"earliest":"-2d","latest":"now"}},"name":"HRV balance — latest"},"ds_breath_latest":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"index=oura oura_data_type=sleep_detail | dedup day sortby -total_sleep_duration | sort -_time | head 1 | eval avg_breath=round(average_breath,1) | table avg_breath","queryParameters":{"earliest":"-2d","latest":"now"}},"name":"Breath rate — latest"},"ds_spo2_trend":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"index=oura oura_data_type=spo2 | dedup day | spath input=_raw path="spo2_percentage.average" output=spo2_avg | eval spo2_avg=round(spo2_avg,2) | timechart span=1d@d avg(spo2_avg) as "SpO2 %""},"name":"SpO2 trend"},"ds_temp_trend":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"index=oura oura_data_type=readiness | dedup day | eval temp_dev=round(temperature_deviation,2) | timechart span=1d@d avg(temp_dev) as "Temp Deviation""},"name":"Skin temp deviation trend"},"ds_hrv_trend":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"index=oura oura_data_type=readiness | dedup day | spath input=_raw path="contributors.hrv_balance" output=hrv_balance | eval hrv=round(hrv_balance,0) | timechart span=1d@d avg(hrv) as "HRV Balance""},"name":"HRV balance trend"},"ds_readiness_trend":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"index=oura oura_data_type=readiness | dedup day | timechart span=1d@d avg(score) as Readiness"},"name":"Readiness score trend"},"ds_sleep_time":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"index=oura oura_data_type=sleep_time | dedup day | spath input=_raw path=recommendation output=recommendation | spath input=_raw path=status output=status | where isnotnull(recommendation) AND recommendation!="null" | sort -_time | head 7 | eval recommendation=replace(recommendation,"_"," ") | eval status=replace(status,"_"," ") | table day, recommendation, status","queryParameters":{"earliest":"-14d","latest":"now"}},"name":"Sleep time recommendations"},"ds_readiness_contributors_trend":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"index=oura oura_data_type=readiness | dedup day | spath input=_raw path="contributors.body_temperature" output=body_temp | spath input=_raw path="contributors.hrv_balance" output=hrv_bal | spath input=_raw path="contributors.resting_heart_rate" output=rhr_score | spath input=_raw path="contributors.recovery_index" output=recovery | timechart span=1d@d avg(body_temp) as "Body Temp", avg(hrv_bal) as "HRV Balance", avg(rhr_score) as "Resting HR", avg(recovery) as "Recovery""},"name":"Recovery contributors trend"},"ds_resilience_latest":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"index=oura oura_data_type=resilience | dedup day | sort -_time | head 1 | eval Level=upper(substr(level,1,1)).substr(level,2) | table Level","queryParameters":{"earliest":"-45d","latest":"now"}},"name":"Resilience level — latest"},"ds_resilience_contrib":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"index=oura oura_data_type=resilience | dedup day | sort -_time | head 1 | spath input=_raw path="contributors.sleep_recovery" output=sr | spath input=_raw path="contributors.daytime_recovery" output=dr | spath input=_raw path="contributors.stress" output=st | eval "Sleep Recovery"=round(sr,0), "Daytime Recovery"=round(dr,0), "Stress"=round(st,0) | table "Sleep Recovery","Daytime Recovery","Stress" | transpose | rename column as contributor, "row 1" as score","queryParameters":{"earliest":"-45d","latest":"now"}},"name":"Resilience contributors"},"ds_resilience_trend":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"index=oura oura_data_type=resilience | dedup day | spath input=_raw path="contributors.sleep_recovery" output=sr | spath input=_raw path="contributors.daytime_recovery" output=dr | spath input=_raw path="contributors.stress" output=st | timechart span=1d@d latest(sr) as "Sleep Recovery", latest(dr) as "Daytime Recovery", latest(st) as "Stress"","queryParameters":{"earliest":"$global_time.earliest$","latest":"$global_time.latest$"}},"name":"Resilience contributors trend"}},"visualizations":{"spo2_sv":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_spo2_latest"},"options":{"majorField":"spo2_avg","majorColor":"> majorValue | rangeValue(colorRange)","context":{"colorRange":[{"from":0,"to":94,"value":"#E8503A"},{"from":94,"to":96,"value":"#F4A422"},{"from":96,"to":100,"value":"#4CAF50"}]},"majorFontSize":72,"majorValue":"> sparklineValues | lastPoint()","trendValue":"> sparklineValues | delta(-2)","sparklineValues":"> primary | seriesByName('spo2_avg')","label":"SpO2","showLabel":true,"labelFontSize":13,"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","trendDisplay":"off","sparklineDisplay":"off","unit":"%","unitPosition":"after"},"title":"Blood Oxygen (SpO2)"},"temp_sv":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_temp_latest"},"options":{"majorField":"temp_dev","majorColor":"> majorValue | rangeValue(colorRange)","context":{"colorRange":[{"from":-2.0,"to":-0.5,"value":"#4263B8"},{"from":-0.5,"to":0.5,"value":"#4CAF50"},{"from":0.5,"to":2.0,"value":"#E8503A"}]},"majorFontSize":48,"majorValue":"> sparklineValues | lastPoint()","trendValue":"> sparklineValues | delta(-2)","sparklineValues":"> primary | seriesByName('temp_dev')","label":"Temp Deviation","showLabel":true,"labelFontSize":13,"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","trendDisplay":"off","sparklineDisplay":"off","unit":" C","unitPosition":"after"},"title":"Skin Temp Deviation"},"temp_trend_sv":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_temp_latest"},"options":{"majorField":"temp_trend","majorColor":"#4CAF50","majorFontSize":48,"majorValue":"> sparklineValues | lastPoint()","trendValue":"> sparklineValues | delta(-2)","sparklineValues":"> primary | seriesByName('temp_trend')","label":"Temp Trend","showLabel":true,"labelFontSize":13,"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","trendDisplay":"off","sparklineDisplay":"off","unit":" C","unitPosition":"after"},"title":"Temp Trend"},"hrv_sv":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_hrv_latest"},"options":{"majorField":"hrv_bal","majorColor":"#A78BFA","majorFontSize":48,"majorValue":"> sparklineValues | lastPoint()","trendValue":"> sparklineValues | delta(-2)","sparklineValues":"> primary | seriesByName('hrv_bal')","label":"HRV Balance","showLabel":true,"labelFontSize":13,"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","trendDisplay":"off","sparklineDisplay":"off"},"title":"HRV Balance Score"},"breath_sv":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_breath_latest"},"options":{"majorField":"avg_breath","majorColor":"#4263B8","majorFontSize":48,"majorValue":"> sparklineValues | lastPoint()","trendValue":"> sparklineValues | delta(-2)","sparklineValues":"> primary | seriesByName('avg_breath')","label":"Avg Breath","showLabel":true,"labelFontSize":13,"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","trendDisplay":"off","sparklineDisplay":"off","unit":" rpm","unitPosition":"after"},"title":"Avg Breath Rate"},"spo2_trend":{"type":"splunk.line","title":"SpO2 Trend","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_spo2_trend"},"options":{"xAxisField":"_time","seriesColors":["#4CAF50"],"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","legendDisplay":"off","showDots":true,"lineWidth":2,"yAxisMin":90,"yAxisMax":100,"yAxisTitle":"SpO2 %"}},"temp_trend_line":{"type":"splunk.area","title":"Skin Temperature Deviation Trend","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_temp_trend"},"options":{"xAxisField":"_time","seriesColors":["#4CAF50"],"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","legendDisplay":"off","showDots":true,"lineWidth":2,"yAxisTitle":"Deviation (C)"}},"hrv_trend_line":{"type":"splunk.line","title":"HRV Balance Trend","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_hrv_trend"},"options":{"xAxisField":"_time","seriesColors":["#A78BFA"],"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","legendDisplay":"off","showDots":true,"lineWidth":2,"yAxisMin":0,"yAxisMax":100,"yAxisTitle":"HRV Balance Score"}},"readiness_trend":{"type":"splunk.line","title":"Readiness Score Trend","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_readiness_trend"},"options":{"xAxisField":"_time","seriesColors":["#4CAF50"],"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","legendDisplay":"off","showDots":true,"lineWidth":2,"yAxisMin":0,"yAxisMax":100,"yAxisTitle":"Score"}},"recovery_trend":{"type":"splunk.line","title":"Recovery Contributors Trend","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_readiness_contributors_trend"},"options":{"xAxisField":"_time","seriesColors":["#4CAF50","#A78BFA","#E8503A","#F4A422"],"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","legendDisplay":"bottom","showDots":true,"lineWidth":2,"yAxisMin":0,"yAxisMax":100,"yAxisTitle":"Score"}},"sleep_time_table":{"type":"splunk.table","title":"Sleep Time Recommendations (Last 7 Days)","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_sleep_time"},"options":{"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","headerBackgroundColor":"#2D3250","rowBackgroundColors":"> table | seriesByIndex(0) | pick(tableAltRowBackgroundColorsByBackgroundColor)","tableAltRowBackgroundColorsByBackgroundColor":[{"value":"#1A1D2E","to":"#232640"}]}},"resilience_level_sv":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_resilience_latest"},"options":{"majorField":"Level","majorColor":"#00CDAF","majorFontSize":36,"label":"Resilience","showLabel":true,"labelFontSize":13,"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","trendDisplay":"off","sparklineDisplay":"off","majorValue":"> primary | seriesByName('Level') | lastPoint()"},"title":"Resilience"},"resilience_contrib_bar":{"type":"splunk.bar","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_resilience_contrib"},"options":{"xAxisField":"contributor","seriesColors":["#00CDAF"],"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","showRoundedBars":true,"legendDisplay":"off","showDataLabels":"all","yAxisMin":0,"yAxisMax":100},"title":"Resilience Contributors"},"resilience_trend":{"type":"splunk.line","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_resilience_trend"},"options":{"xAxisField":"_time","seriesColors":["#7B56DB","#009CEB","#DD9900"],"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","legendDisplay":"bottom","showDots":true,"lineWidth":2,"yAxisTitle":"Score"},"title":"Recovery Contributors Trend"},"wellness_guide":{"type":"splunk.markdown","options":{"markdown":"### About these metrics
- **Blood Oxygen (SpO2)** — % oxygen in your blood overnight; ~95–100% is typical.
- **Skin Temp Deviation** — how far last night's skin temperature sat from your personal baseline (°C); large swings can flag illness or cycle changes.
- **HRV Balance** — a Readiness contributor comparing your heart-rate variability to your baseline; steady/high = well recovered.
- **Readiness Score** — Oura's daily estimate of how recovered you are (0–100).
- **Resilience** — your longer-term capacity to handle stress (limited → exceptional), from recovery and stress balance.

**Learn more:** [Oura — Readiness](https://support.ouraring.com/hc/en-us/articles/360025589793-Readiness-Score) · [Resilience](https://support.ouraring.com/hc/en-us/articles/25358829055251-Resilience)","backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)"}}},"layout":{"options":{},"globalInputs":["input_global_trp"],"tabs":{"items":[{"layoutId":"layout_1","label":"New tab"}]},"layoutDefinitions":{"layout_1":{"type":"absolute","structure":[{"item":"spo2_sv","type":"block","position":{"x":20,"y":20,"w":280,"h":200}},{"item":"temp_sv","type":"block","position":{"x":320,"y":20,"w":220,"h":200}},{"item":"temp_trend_sv","type":"block","position":{"x":560,"y":20,"w":220,"h":200}},{"item":"hrv_sv","type":"block","position":{"x":800,"y":20,"w":220,"h":200}},{"item":"breath_sv","type":"block","position":{"x":1040,"y":20,"w":220,"h":200}},{"item":"spo2_trend","type":"block","position":{"x":20,"y":240,"w":440,"h":260}},{"item":"temp_trend_line","type":"block","position":{"x":480,"y":240,"w":440,"h":260}},{"item":"hrv_trend_line","type":"block","position":{"x":940,"y":240,"w":480,"h":260}},{"item":"readiness_trend","type":"block","position":{"x":20,"y":520,"w":440,"h":260}},{"item":"recovery_trend","type":"block","position":{"x":480,"y":520,"w":680,"h":260}},{"item":"sleep_time_table","type":"block","position":{"x":1180,"y":520,"w":240,"h":260}},{"item":"resilience_level_sv","type":"block","position":{"x":20,"y":820,"w":240,"h":260}},{"item":"resilience_contrib_bar","type":"block","position":{"x":280,"y":820,"w":560,"h":260}},{"item":"resilience_trend","type":"block","position":{"x":860,"y":820,"w":560,"h":260}},{"item":"wellness_guide","type":"block","position":{"x":20,"y":1100,"w":1400,"h":230}}],"options":{"width":1440,"height":1350,"display":"auto","backgroundImage":{"x":0,"y":0,"src":"/static/app/oura_health/bg_health.svg","sizeType":"cover"}}}}}}
